subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who created the heavens and the earth in less than a moment, this being that which was ordained by His command, did ye but know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی خلق السموات و الارض اقرب من آن و هذا ما قدر بامره ان انتم تعلمون
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @mindfulness; concentration; focus, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
